parts.text:
{
  "mission_codename": "OPERATION SILENT ECLIPSE",
  "target": "The Caduceus Archives, a heavily fortified digital repository housing encrypted corporate secrets for the powerful Solstice Conglomerate.",
  "location_flavor": "Midnight, under a rare, almost total lunar eclipse, granting a tight 20-minute window of reduced satellite surveillance.",
  "antagonist_move": "Inspector Vega has increased her cyber-surveillance teams, anticipating our next move will target digital assets.",
  "briefing_text": "Your last flawless extraction from the museum has only sharpened Vega's focus. We've traced a vital data fragment to the Caduceus Archives, a fortress of pure information. This isn't about physical theft; it's about ghosting through networks and leaving no trace. Fail, and not only does our entire operation unravel, but the data itself could become a weapon against us.",
  "mission_hook": "The target vault is air-gapped, requiring a physical injection of malware directly into its core server rack."
}
